title: Tree Harvester
description: Sneak and chop one log to fell the whole tree. Supports all vanilla logs, configurable limits, and optional leaf clearing.
body:
# Tree Harvester Plus

Cut trees faster without turning the game into creative mode.

Tree Harvester Plus lets you sneak and break one log to fell the whole connected tree, with configurable limits and optional leaf clearing so you can keep the feature practical instead of overpowered.

## Features
- Sneak and break one log to fell the full tree
- Supports all vanilla logs and Nether stems
- Optional leaf clearing
- Configurable max logs and max leaves
- Sneak requirement can be toggled
- Tool durability is still consumed normally

## Why use it
- Faster wood farming
- Less repetitive early-game grinding
- Great for vanilla+ survival and SMP servers

## Config file
`config/treeharvesterplus.json`

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
